hooks.command:
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then echo '## IMPORTANT: Before committing, you MUST:
1. Read and follow .ai/rules/commit.md (no AI co-author, conventional commit format)
2. Run the superpowers:requesting-code-review skill to verify all .ai/rules/ are respected in changed files

Do NOT proceed with the commit until both steps are completed.'; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push'; then echo '## IMPORTANT: Before pushing, you MUST verify:
1. README.md files are up to date with any new/changed commands or features
2. Code comments and help commands reflect the current behavior
3. TOC Notes field is accurate

Do NOT push until documentation is verified and updated if needed.'; exit 2; fi; exit 0
